basic_details.job_title: NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela) has officially announced the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. Candidates up to 28 years of age who hold an M.Tech./ M.E./ M.S. (GATE qualified) in relevant fields with 60% marks, B.E./ B.Tech. with a valid GATE score and 65% marks, or M.Sc. with GATE/ CSIR-UGC NET/ GPAT and 65% marks can submit their applications through Email on or before 12-07-2026. Direct links to download the official notification and application details are shared below.

age_limit.details: All Posts: Maximum age limit is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable up to 5 years for SC/ST/PWD/Female candidates and 3 years for OBC (Non-creamy layer) candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: MTech/ME/MS (GATE qualified) in relevant fields with 60% marks, B.E./B.Tech. with Valid GATE score and 65% marks, M.Sc. (GATE/CSIR UGC NET/GPAT) with 65% marks
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): MTech/ME/MS (with GATE qualified) in Electronics and Communication/ Electrical and Electronics/ Electrical/ Electronics/ Instrumentation/ Computer Science and Engineering or similar with specialization in Electronics/ Communication/ Signal Processing or similar with minimum 60% marks or 6.5/10 CGPA in both BE/BTech and ME/MTech. (Or) B.E./B.Tech. in Electronics/Electronics and Communication/Electronics and Telecommunication/Electrical and Electronics/ Electronics Instrumentation/Electrical Engineering/Computer Science Engineering or similar with minimum 65% marks or 7.0/10 CGPA and Valid GATE score (Or) M.Sc. (with GATE/CSIR UGC NET/GPAT) in Electronics or similar with 65% marks or 7.0/10 CGPA

salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): INR 37,000.00 /- per month + HRA (GATE qualified); INR 30,000.00 /- per month + HRA (without GATE)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 12-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Rourkela Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): MTech/ME/MS (with GATE qualified) in Electronics and Communication/ Electrical and Electronics/ Electrical/ Electronics/ Instrumentation/ Computer Science and Engineering or similar with specialization in Electronics/ Communication/ Signal Processing or similar with minimum 60% marks or 6.5/10 CGPA in both BE/BTech and ME/MTech. (Or) B.E./B.Tech. in Electronics/Electronics and Communication/Electronics and Telecommunication/Electrical and Electronics/ Electronics Instrumentation/Electrical Engineering/Computer Science Engineering or similar with minimum 65% marks or 7.0/10 CGPA and Valid GATE score (Or) M.Sc. (with GATE/CSIR UGC NET/GPAT) in Electronics or similar with 65% marks or 7.0/10 CGPA

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: All Posts: Maximum age limit is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable up to 5 years for SC/ST/PWD/Female candidates and 3 years for OBC (Non-creamy layer) candidates.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): INR 37,000.00 /- per month + HRA (GATE qualified); INR 30,000.00 /- per month + HRA (without GATE)

rows.event: Last Date for submitting the Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 12-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies for Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts in NIT Rourkela Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post in the NIT Rourkela Recruitment 2026. This opportunity is for eligible candidates seeking a contractual government job.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Rourkela JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post at NIT Rourkela is 12 July 2026. Candidates must ensure their applications are sent via email before this deadline.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for NIT Rourkela JRF posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts at NIT Rourkela is through Email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position is 28 years. Age relaxation is provided for reserved categories as per government norms, including 5 years for SC/ST/PWD/Female and 3 years for OBC.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need an MTech/ME/MS (GATE qualified) in relevant fields with 60% marks, or B.E./B.Tech. with a valid GATE score and 65% marks, or M.Sc. (GATE/CSIR UGC NET/GPAT) with 65% marks.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for a Junior Research Fellow (JRF) at NIT Rourkela?
faq.answer: The salary for a Junior Research Fellow (JRF) is INR 37,000.00 per month + HRA for GATE qualified candidates, and INR 30,000.00 per month + HRA for candidates without GATE qualification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at NIT Rourkela includes an Online Interview, followed by the preparation of a Merit List. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the NIT Rourkela JRF Recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026. Candidates can apply free of cost.

faq.question: Q9. When was the advertisement for this recruitment released?
faq.answer: The advertisement for the NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment was released on 25 June 2026. This date marks the official announcement of the job opportunity.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the job location for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post?
faq.answer: The job location for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post is Rourkela, Odisha, specifically at the National Institute of Technology Rourkela. This is a contractual government job opportunity.
